# Toolbar

Use `Toolbar` for grouped controls that act on the same surface or document context.

## When to Use

- Editors and command surfaces
- Dense grouped controls above tables or previews

## Wraps

- `reka-ui` toolbar primitives

## What Shadcn Adds

- Consistent grouped-control spacing and alignment with buttons and toggles

## Installation

```bash
pnpm dlx shadcn-vue@latest add toolbar
```

## Example Patterns

- Vanilla: grouped icon and text actions
- Contextual: editor or data table toolbar
